failedAssertions.reason: 6x6 square indicators remain but use non-contract colors (e.g., rgb(239,68,68), rgb(249,115,22), rgb(234,179,8), rgb(59,130,246)) instead of alive=#82E88A, error=#FF6060, or idle=transparent+border.
Button primitive styling is still inconsistent across visible UI; computed-style audit found 20 failing buttons out of 27 sampled (border, size, and uppercase mismatches).

appliedUpdates.description: Added guidance that direct navigation to /api/health may miss network-history capture and an explicit fetch('/api/health') capture is more reliable for evidence.

frictions.description: Direct /api/health document navigation did not reliably populate network-history captures.
frictions.resolution: Captured health evidence using explicit in-page fetch('/api/health') and saved the response artifact.
